tool.name: Simple Analyzer
tool.description: Simple automated analysis tool for reflectivity data using LLM models.

param.name: context_file
param.label: Sample Context (Markdown)
param.help: Free-form Markdown note describing the sample stack, ambient medium, and any fitting hints. Consumed by plan-data.

param.name: sequence_total
param.label: Parts per complete sequence
param.help: Expected number of partial files in a complete sequence.

param.name: config_json
param.label: JSON Configuration
param.help: A v1 workflow state JSON. When provided, all path/env values come from the state and the individual parameters above are ignored.

configfiles.configfile:
#raw """Emit shell exports for tool-XML bash from a v1 (or v0) workflow-state JSON.
Slim helper inlined in each tool so the container doesn't need ndip_state installed. Only emits the env vars the bash actually uses; merge logic is in the underlying CLIs (simple-reduction / plan-data / analyze-sample / data-assembler ingest / nr-isaac-format convert-ingest). """ import json, os, shlex, sys
def _path(s, key, default=""): p = s.get("paths") or {} return p.get(key) or s.get(key) or default
state_path, env_path = sys.argv[1], sys.argv[2] if state_path and os.path.isfile(state_path): with open(state_path) as f: s = json.load(f) or {} else: s = {}
llm = s.get("llm") or {} red = s.get("reduction") or {} seq = s.get("sequence_total") event_file = _path(s, "event_file") or _path(s, "input_file")
exports = { "OUTPUT_DIR": _path(s, "output_directory"), "EVENT_FILE": event_file, "TEMPLATE": _path(s, "template_file"), "DATA_DIR": _path(s, "data_directory") or (os.path.dirname(event_file) if event_file else ""), "CONTEXT_FILE": _path(s, "context_file"), "REFLECTIVITY_FILE": red.get("result_file") or s.get("result_file", ""), "SEQUENCE_TOTAL": "" if seq is None else str(seq), "LLM_PROVIDER": llm.get("provider") or s.get("llm_provider", ""), "LLM_MODEL": llm.get("model") or s.get("llm_model", ""), "LLM_BASE_URL": llm.get("base_url") or s.get("llm_base_url", ""), } with open(env_path, "w") as f: for k, v in exports.items(): f.write("export %s=%s\n" % (k, shlex.quote(str(v)))) #end raw

tool.command:
#if $config_json and str($config_json) != "None" python '$state_env' '$config_json' _env.sh && . _env.sh && #else export LLM_PROVIDER='$llm_provider' && export LLM_MODEL='$llm_model' && export LLM_BASE_URL='$llm_base_url' && export SEQUENCE_TOTAL='$sequence_total' && export OUTPUT_DIR='$output_dir' && export REFLECTIVITY_FILE='$reflectivity_file' && #if $context_file and str($context_file) != "None" export CONTEXT_FILE='$context_file' && #else export CONTEXT_FILE='' && #end if #end if
if [ -z "\$REFLECTIVITY_FILE" ] || [ "\$REFLECTIVITY_FILE" = "None" ] || [ ! -f "\$REFLECTIVITY_FILE" ]; then echo "ERROR: reflectivity file is missing or unreadable: '\$REFLECTIVITY_FILE'" | tee -a $output >&2; echo " Connect a config_json with reduction.result_file set, or supply the Reflectivity File input." | tee -a $output >&2; exit 1; fi && if [ -z "\$CONTEXT_FILE" ] || [ "\$CONTEXT_FILE" = "None" ] || [ ! -f "\$CONTEXT_FILE" ]; then echo "ERROR: context file is missing or unreadable: '\$CONTEXT_FILE'" | tee -a $output >&2; echo " Connect a config_json with paths.context_file set, or supply the Sample Context input." | tee -a $output >&2; exit 1; fi &&
mkdir -p "\$OUTPUT_DIR"/plan "\$OUTPUT_DIR"/models "\$OUTPUT_DIR"/results "\$OUTPUT_DIR"/reports && export ANALYZER_MODELS_DIR="\$OUTPUT_DIR"/models && export ANALYZER_RESULTS_DIR="\$OUTPUT_DIR"/results && export ANALYZER_REPORTS_DIR="\$OUTPUT_DIR"/reports && export ANALYZER_PARTIAL_DATA_DIR="\$OUTPUT_DIR" && export ANALYZER_COMBINED_DATA_DIR="\$OUTPUT_DIR" &&
PLAN_STATE="\$OUTPUT_DIR/plan_state.json" &&
echo "=== plan-data ===" | tee -a $output && echo "Using reflectivity file: \$REFLECTIVITY_FILE" | tee -a $output && echo "Using context file: \$CONTEXT_FILE" | tee -a $output && plan-data "\$REFLECTIVITY_FILE" "\$CONTEXT_FILE" --output-dir "\$OUTPUT_DIR"/plan --sequence-total "\$SEQUENCE_TOTAL" #if $config_json and str($config_json) != "None" --state-in '$config_json' #end if --state-out "\$PLAN_STATE" > >(tee -a $output) 2> >(tee -a $output >&2) &&
PERFORM_ASSEMBLY=`python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); print('1' if (d.get('analysis') or {}).get('perform_assembly') else '0')" "\$PLAN_STATE"` && MODEL_NAME=`python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); print((d.get('analysis') or {}).get('model_name') or '')" "\$PLAN_STATE"` && JOB_YAML=`python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); print(((d.get('analysis') or {}).get('metadata') or {}).get('job_yaml') or '')" "\$PLAN_STATE"` && echo "analysis.model_name=\$MODEL_NAME perform_assembly=\$PERFORM_ASSEMBLY" | tee -a $output && echo "analysis.metadata.job_yaml=\$JOB_YAML" | tee -a $output &&
if [ "\$PERFORM_ASSEMBLY" = "1" ]; then echo "=== analyze-sample (reduction gate disabled) ===" | tee -a $output && set -o pipefail; analyze-sample --no-reduction-gate --state-in "\$PLAN_STATE" --state-out '$updated_config' > >(tee -a $output) 2> >(tee -a $output >&2); ANALYZE_EXIT=\$?; set +o pipefail; echo "--- analyze-sample exit code: \$ANALYZE_EXIT ---" | tee -a $output; if [ "\$ANALYZE_EXIT" -ne 0 ]; then echo "ERROR: analyze-sample failed with exit code \$ANALYZE_EXIT" | tee -a $output >&2; fi; else echo "analysis.perform_assembly is false; skipping analyze-sample." | tee -a $output; fi &&
if [ ! -f '$updated_config' ]; then echo "analyze-sample did not write a state file; seeding updated_config from plan state." | tee -a $output >&2; cp "\$PLAN_STATE" '$updated_config'; fi &&
echo "=== post-run inventory ===" | tee -a $output && (ls -la "\$OUTPUT_DIR"/models 2>&1 || true) | tee -a $output && (ls -la "\$OUTPUT_DIR"/results 2>&1 || true) | tee -a $output && (ls -la "\$OUTPUT_DIR"/reports 2>&1 || true) | tee -a $output &&
PROBLEM_JSON=`python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); print((d.get('analysis') or {}).get('problem_json') or '')" '$updated_config'` && if [ -n "\$PROBLEM_JSON" ] && [ -f "\$PROBLEM_JSON" ]; then echo "Selected problem.json: \$PROBLEM_JSON" | tee -a $output; cat "\$PROBLEM_JSON" > $output_model; else echo "WARNING: No problem.json available; falling back to job YAML as output_model." | tee -a $output >&2; if [ -n "\$JOB_YAML" ] && [ -f "\$JOB_YAML" ]; then cp "\$JOB_YAML" $output_model; else echo "(no job YAML either; emitting empty output_model)" | tee -a $output >&2; : > $output_model; fi; fi
